testcase.name: Search a flight from Cali to Havana
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search a flight from Cali to Havana &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/search_flight.feature:3&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe user is on Latam homepage&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.latam.automation.stepdefinitions.SearchFlightStepDefinitions.the_user_is_on_latam_homepage()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe user selects origin city Cali&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.latam.automation.stepdefinitions.SearchFlightStepDefinitions.the_user_selects_origin_city_cali()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe user selects destination city Havana&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.latam.automation.stepdefinitions.SearchFlightStepDefinitions.the_user_selects_destination_city_havana()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe user selects travel dates&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.latam.automation.stepdefinitions.SearchFlightStepDefinitions.the_user_selects_travel_dates()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mclicks on search flights button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.latam.automation.stepdefinitions.SearchFlightStepDefinitions.clicks_on_search_flights_button()&amp#27;[0m Resultados mostrados correctamente &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mflights results should be displayed&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.latam.automation.stepdefinitions.SearchFlightStepDefinitions.flights_results_should_be_displayed()&amp#27;[0m
testcase.system-err:

Other discovery selectors are ignored!
